description_long: This is a three-story commercial building with a steeply pitched slate roof, two prominent brick chimneys, and a blue-trimmed facade. The front features two large bay windows on the second floor and a wide glass storefront at street level, above which is a green pharmacy sign. The side and rear walls are plain, painted in a light gray color, with minimal windows and no decorative elements. The roof shows weathering and realistic texturing, while the brick chimneys add a touch of traditional character. The ground floor entrance is centrally located, flanked by display windows, and the upper floors have symmetrically arranged sash windows. The overall structure is solid and rectangular, typical of older urban commercial buildings.
description: A three-story, blue-trimmed commercial building with a pharmacy storefront, bay windows, and a steep slate roof with brick chimneys.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pharmacy storefront, two bay windows, and the main entrance with blue trim.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, windowless wall and the side profile of the roof and chimneys.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple facade, a few small windows, and the back slope of the roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain wall with two windows and the side of the roof and chimneys.
attribute_storefront_signage: A green sign above the entrance with the word 'pharmacy' in white text, accompanied by smaller white text and a blue trim; signage is simple and modern.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a central glass entrance flanked by large display windows, with two bay windows above and a prominent green sign above the door. The facade is symmetrical and framed with blue trim.
